channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping, 2nd May
item.description:
Fly tipping in Blackheath Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackheath Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Station sign needs rising up and permanently secured, 2nd May
item.description:
H&S issue. Guys station sign on path has slipped down and my hit someone in the face . Second time I have reported this issue. Still no action. Did speak to station who informed me it was Lew responsibility. Please action ASAP . Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Silverdale, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip by community board, 2nd May
item.description:
Small flytip by community board

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead tree, 2nd May
item.description:
Tree on grass verge outside 29 Willersley Avenue. This is the second tree which has been planted over the last 3to 4 years and both have died When a new one is planted can I suggest that a new hole is dug for the root ball at least a yard from the present one.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Willersley Avenue, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Rubbish, 2nd May
item.description:
Same old shit just another day

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Strathnairn Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead squirrel, 2nd May
item.description:
Dead squirrel. A bit distressing for kids to see

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blandford Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cardboard left, 2nd May
item.description:
Cardboard boxes and rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cromford Path, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Same problem, 2nd May
item.description:
The paladin bins are too big. Bin chute fire close recently installed (without section 20 notice) are too big (and bad VFM). Cant get bags in easily. Dumped on floor.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping by 13 Nutbrook Street: two black bin bag on the pavement, 2nd May
item.description:
Two black bin bags outside 13 Nutbrook Street. First seen this afternoon.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Nutbrook Street, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, has now been blocking pavement for 20 days, 2nd May
item.description:
This vehicle has been abandoned and blocking the pavement since April 12th. It has previously been reported and that report says it is closed, yet no action has been taken. The vehicle has no MOT and no insurance.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Voce Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two fridges outside 14 and 12 lucknow street, 2nd May
item.description:
Two fridges dumped outside 14 and 12 lucknow street.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lucknow Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping and very dirty street, 2nd May
item.description:
Fly tipping and a generally messy road and pavement. Needs regular sweeping etc to maintain standards

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grangemill Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Raleigh maverick bike frame abandoned, 2nd May
item.description:
Raleigh frame, rusted chain, no wheels. Looks like it’s been here a while

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ridley Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 2nd May
item.description:
Ravensbourne Court. Please clear fflytip from By recycling bins

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coldbath Street, Lewisham

item.title: Rubbish, 2nd May
item.description:
Rubbish left in front of the door before collection day

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Common Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped food, 2nd May
item.description:
Meat has been dumped again down the alley behind 14-19 old school close again. Housing association has written to all houses on street not sure whether someone is throwing it over the wall.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old School Close, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builders rubbish left against the wall by bins, 2nd May
item.description:
Not something the dustmen will usually pick up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 62-82, Bird in Bush Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 2nd May
item.description:
Lots of wood and cardboard on the road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brooke Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown hedge dangerous blocking view of pedestrians, 2nd May
item.description:
The hedge has grown so far over the pavement that it is impossible to see pedestrians from my driveway. I asked the neighbour to trim hedge back to boundary it was only trimmed a little . I nearly hit a pedestrian and the postman it’s very dangerous. Can this hedge please be trimmed fully back to the boundary as a matter of urgency as it is causing me and my son who is a learner driver a lot of stress and affecting our mental health.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crosier Close, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bins blocking the pavement, 2nd May
item.description:
Outside number 12 there are full garbage bins causing overspill to litter the road and the pavement opposite. They are also causing restricted access to pushchairs and wheelchairs, making vulnerable people more vulnerable by having to use the road instead of the blocked pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Allens Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet
